channel.title: Cauterized on Great Chinese Food
channel.description: Recent content in Cauterized on Great Chinese Food

item.title: 最简单的bai灼xia（shuizhu）yanshui基尾xia (The simplest white cauterized shrimp (boiled) brine-based tail shrimp)
item.description:
Learn how to make 最简单的bai灼xia（shuizhu）yanshui基尾xia (The simplest white cauterized shrimp (boiled) brine-based tail shrimp) with this easy recipe.

Ingredients

Ingredient Amount
基围虾 1斤（大约20多只）

Seasonings

  • 姜片 4-6片
  • 料酒 2大勺
  • 盐 两小勺
  • 大葱 4段
  • 或者小葱 4-5根
  • 生抽 1勺
  • 醋 4滴

Instructions

  1. Prepare ingredients.\n2. Cook according to recipe.\n3. Serve and enjoy.

Tips

For best results, use fresh ingredients.
